page.title: Storefront
page.subtitle: Roasted SKUs traced bag-to-lot, with live finished-goods inventory.

empty.title: No SKUs in the catalog yet
empty.description: Mint a roasted product, then link a bag to a green lot you hold to start selling it.

sku.title: New lot-linked SKU
sku.lotHint: Only a lot you actually hold can back a bag (it is the bag's whole provenance chain).
sku.gtinHint: The GS1 bag-label identity. Optional until you sell through retail.
sku.noLots: No green lots to back a bag yet.

movement.title: Record a finished-goods movement
movement.unitsHint: Bags moved. A sale draws inventory down; the till can never go below zero.

errors.slugRequired: Enter a slug for the product.
errors.nameRequired: Enter a name for the product.
errors.productRequired: Pick a product for this SKU.
errors.lotRequired: Pick the green lot this bag is backed by.
errors.priceInvalid: Enter a price of zero or more.
errors.qtyInvalid: Enter a non-zero number of units.
errors.generic: Could not save that. Check the details and try again.
errors.access: You don't have access to manage the catalog.
